'''竏喇-ch-sh''' ('''kahachash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stap|stap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stap|stap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-ch-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kahachash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihachash|thihachash]] || [[word:jihachash|jihachash]] || [[word:shihachash|shihachash]] || [[word:kihachash|kihachash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhachash|thuthuhachash]] || [[word:jujuhachash|jujuhachash]] || [[word:shushuhachash|shushuhachash]] || [[word:kukuhachash|kukuhachash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhachash|thuhachash]] || [[word:juhachash|juhachash]] || [[word:shuhachash|shuhachash]] || [[word:kuhachash|kuhachash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhachash|thuhachash]] || [[word:juhachash|juhachash]] || [[word:shuhachash|shuhachash]] || [[word:kuhachash|kuhachash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehachash|thehachash]] || [[word:jehachash|jehachash]] || [[word:shehachash|shehachash]] || [[word:kehachash|kehachash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohachash|thothohachash]] || [[word:jojohachash|jojohachash]] || [[word:shoshohachash|shoshohachash]] || [[word:kokohachash|kokohachash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohachash|thohachash]] || [[word:johachash|johachash]] || [[word:shohachash|shohachash]] || [[word:kohachash|kohachash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohachash|thohachash]] || [[word:johachash|johachash]] || [[word:shohachash|shohachash]] || [[word:kohachash|kohachash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦhachash|thﾃｦhachash]] || [[word:jﾃｦhachash|jﾃｦhachash]] || [[word:shﾃｦhachash|shﾃｦhachash]] || [[word:kﾃｦhachash|kﾃｦhachash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahachash|thathahachash]] || [[word:jajahachash|jajahachash]] || [[word:shashahachash|shashahachash]] || [[word:kakahachash|kakahachash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahachash|thahachash]] || [[word:jahachash|jahachash]] || [[word:shahachash|shahachash]] || [[word:kahachash|kahachash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahachash|thahachash]] || [[word:jahachash|jahachash]] || [[word:shahachash|shahachash]] || [[word:kahachash|kahachash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahachash|shahachash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahachash|goshahachash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahachash|gokishahachash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahachashnﾃｼ|shahachashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahachashnknﾃｼ|goshahachashnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahachashnﾃｼ|gokishahachashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahachashﾃｫ|shahachashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahachashnkshﾃｫ|goshahachashnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahachashﾃｫ|gokishahachashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahachashro|shahachashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahachashnkro|goshahachashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahachashro|gokishahachashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahachashmu|shahachashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahachashnkmu|goshahachashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahachashmu|gokishahachashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahachasher|shahachasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahachashnksher|goshahachashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahachasher|gokishahachasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahachashng|shahachashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahachashnkng|goshahachashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahachashng|gokishahachashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahachashya|shahachashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahachashnkya|goshahachashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahachashya|gokishahachashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahachashyam|shahachashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahachashnkyam|goshahachashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahachashyam|gokishahachashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahachashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shahachashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahachashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshahachashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahachashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishahachashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahachashnﾃｼro|shahachashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahachashnknﾃｼro|goshahachashnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahachashnﾃｼro|gokishahachashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahachashnﾃｼmu|shahachashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahachashnknﾃｼmu|goshahachashnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahachashnﾃｼmu|gokishahachashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahachashﾃｫnﾃｼ|shahachashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahachashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshahachashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahachashﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishahachashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahachashﾃｫro|shahachashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahachashnkshﾃｫro|goshahachashnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahachashﾃｫro|gokishahachashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahachashﾃｫmu|shahachashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahachashnkshﾃｫmu|goshahachashnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahachashﾃｫmu|gokishahachashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahachashronﾃｼ|shahachashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahachashnkronﾃｼ|goshahachashnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahachashronﾃｼ|gokishahachashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahachashroshﾃｫ|shahachashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahachashnkroshﾃｫ|goshahachashnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahachashroshﾃｫ|gokishahachashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahachashromu|shahachashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahachashnkromu|goshahachashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahachashromu|gokishahachashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahachashmunﾃｼ|shahachashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahachashnkmunﾃｼ|goshahachashnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahachashmunﾃｼ|gokishahachashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahachashmushﾃｫ|shahachashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahachashnkmushﾃｫ|goshahachashnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahachashmushﾃｫ|gokishahachashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahachashmuro|shahachashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahachashnkmuro|goshahachashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahachashmuro|gokishahachashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
